meaning: adj.&n.<美口>反对使用核能的(人),反对使用核武器的(人)
examples: The paper released Tuesday in Tokyo by the International Commission on Nuclear Nonproliferation and Disarmament is representative of international antinuke theology.
Antinuke activists have lost a lot of their old fire and clout (see "The Silence of the Nuke Protesters, " Jan. 31).
Antinuke activists have lost a lot of their old fire and clout (see "The Silence of the Nuke Protesters, " Feb. 7).
